lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਖਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap karaae kare aap aape har rakhaa |3|
lines.english: He Himself is the Doer, and He Himself is the Cause; the Lord Himself is our Saving Grace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਭੈ ਕੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa gur nahee bhettiaa bhai kee naahee bind |
lines.english: Those who do not meet with the Guru, who have no Fear of God at all,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਵਣੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਘਣਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚੂਕੈ ਚਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaavan dukh ghanaa kade na chookai chind |
lines.english: continue coming and going in reincarnation, and suffer terrible pain; their anxiety is never relieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਪੜ ਜਿਵੈ ਪਛੋੜੀਐ ਘੜੀ ਮੁਹਤ ਘੜੀਆਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaparr jivai pachhorreeai gharree muhat gharreeaal |
lines.english: They are beaten like clothes being washed on the rocks, and struck every hour like chimes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਢੂਢੀ ਸਜਣਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਬੁਰੀ ਜਗਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: tribhavan dtoodtee sajanaa haumai buree jagat |
lines.english: I have searched throughout the three worlds, O my friend; egotism is bad for the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਰਹੁ ਨ ਚੁਕੈ ਜੰਜਾਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam bin sirahu na chukai janjaal |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, these entanglements are not removed from hanging over one's head. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਝੁਰੁ ਹੀਅੜੇ ਸਚੁ ਚਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naa jhur heearre sach chau naanak sacho sach |2|
lines.english: Don't worry, O my soul; speak the Truth, O Nanak, the Truth, and only the Truth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿਓਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aape bakhasion har naam samaane |
lines.english: The Lord Himself forgives the Gurmukhs; they are absorbed and immersed in the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਇਓਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਨੀਸਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape bhagatee laaeon gur sabad neesaane |
lines.english: He Himself links them to devotional worship; they bear the Insignia of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਨਮੁਖ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਿ ਜਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: sanamukh sadaa sohane sachai dar jaane |
lines.english: Those who turn towards the Guru, as sunmukh, are beautiful. They are famous in the Court of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਹਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan se jan jin har seviaa tin hau kurabaane |4|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed are those humble beings who serve the Lord. I am a sacrifice to them. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਓਥੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਹੈ ਜਿਨ ਰਾਮ ਪਛਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: aithai othai mukat hai jin raam pachhaane |
lines.english: In this world, and in the world hereafter, they are liberated; they realize the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲ ਕੁਚਜੀ ਮੜਵੜੀ ਕਾਲੀ ਮਨਹੁ ਕਸੁਧ ॥
lines.translit: mehal kuchajee marravarree kaalee manahu kasudh |
lines.english: The rude, ill-mannered bride is encased in the body-tomb; she is blackened, and her mind is impure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਤਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਮੁੰਧ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: je gun hovan taa pir ravai naanak avagun mundh |1|
lines.english: She can enjoy her Husband Lord, only if she is virtuous. O Nanak, the soul-bride is unworthy, and without virtue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਸੀਲ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੀ ਸਾ ਪੂਰੀ ਪਰਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saach seel sach sanjamee saa pooree paravaar |
lines.english: She has good conduct, true self-discipline, and a perfect family.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਸਦਾ ਭਲੀ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak ahinis sadaa bhalee pir kai het piaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, day and night, she is always good; she loves her Beloved Husband Lord. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa aap pachhaaniaa naam nidhaan paaeaa |
lines.english: One who realizes his own self, is blessed with the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਿਰਮਲੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee niramalee har ras peeaeaa |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Bani is immaculate and pure; through it, one drinks in the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਆਪਣੀ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaa kar kai aapanee gur sabad milaaeaa |
lines.english: Granting His Mercy, the Guru merges him in the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀ ਸਦਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਭਏ ਫਿਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: har ras pee sadaa tripat bhe fir trisanaa bhukh gavaaeaa |5|
lines.english: Drinking in the sublime essence of the Lord, they remain satisfied forever; their hunger and thirst are quenched. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਅਨ ਰਸ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har ras jinee chaakhiaa an ras tthaak rahaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who taste the sublime essence of the Lord, forsake other flavors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧਨ ਆਗੈ ਖੜੀ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੀ ਨਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak dhan aagai kharree sobhaavantee naar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, that bride who stands before Him, is the most noble and respected woman. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਖੁਸੀਏ ਧਨ ਰਾਵੀਏ ਧਨ ਉਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: pir khusee dhan raavee dhan ur naam seegaar |
lines.english: Her Husband Lord is pleased, and He enjoys His bride; the soul-bride adorns her heart with the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸੁਰੈ ਪੇਈਐ ਕੰਤ ਕੀ ਕੰਤੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਅਥਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sasurai peeeai kant kee kant agam athaahu |
lines.english: In her father-in-law's home hereafter, and in her parents' home in this world, she belongs to her Husband Lord. Her Husband is inaccessible and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧੰਨੁ ਸੋੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਜੋ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak dhan souhaaganee jo bhaaveh veparavaah |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, she is the happy soul-bride, who is pleasing to her carefree, independent Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਰਾਜੇ ਸੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sach pachhaaniaa sach raaje seee |
lines.english: Those who realize the True Lord, they alone are the true kings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਖਤਿ ਰਾਜਾ ਸੋ ਬਹੈ ਜਿ ਤਖਤੈ ਲਾਇਕ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: takhat raajaa so bahai ji takhatai laaeik hoee |
lines.english: That king sits upon the throne, who is worthy of that throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਜਾਦੇ ਬਿਲਮ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa kiaa saalaaheeai jis jaade bilam na hoee |
lines.english: Why should someone praise someone else who is also created? They depart in no time at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਿ ਭੂਪਤਿ ਰਾਜੇ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: ehi bhoopat raaje na aakheeeh doojai bhaae dukh hoee |
lines.english: These mere earthly rulers are not called kings; in the love of duality, they suffer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਚਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: nihachal sachaa ek hai guramukh boojhai su nihachal hoee |6|
lines.english: The One True Lord is eternal and imperishable. One who, as Gurmukh, understands becomes eternal as well. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak se sohaaganee ji satigur maeh samaeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are the pure soul-brides, who merge in the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਖਾਲੀ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa pir ek hai pir bin khaalee naeh |
lines.english: The One Lord is the Husband of all. No one is without the Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਰਾਚੈ ਸਚ ਰੰਗਿ ਗੂੜੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਅਪਾਰ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: je raachai sach rang goorrai rang apaar kai |
lines.english: Be absorbed in the Lord's True Love, and imbued with the deep color of the Lord's Infinite Love.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੇ ਅਧਿਕ ਤਰੰਗ ਕਿਉ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਛੁਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: man ke adhik tarang kiau dar saahib chhutteeai |
lines.english: The mind is churning with so many waves of desire. How can one be emancipated in the Court of the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਜੇ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਗੈ ਸਚਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak gur parasaadee chhutteeai je chit lagai sach |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, by Guru's Grace, one is emancipated, if the consciousness is attached to the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam amol hai kiau keemat keejai |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is priceless. How can its value be estimated?
